title: Validation error for invalid phone/WhatsApp format blocks registration
description: Verifies that entering an invalid phone format shows a validation error and prevents redirect to OTP verification.

title: Password and confirm password mismatch shows validation and blocks submission
description: Verifies that mismatched passwords trigger a visible validation message and prevent moving forward.

title: Required field validation appears when attempting to register with missing name
description: Verifies required field validation is displayed when a required field (name) is left blank.

title: Duplicate username shows server-side error and stays on registration page
description: Verifies that registering with an already-used username surfaces a visible error and prevents redirect.

title: Request reset OTP with a registered phone number shows success guidance
description: Verifies the forgot password form accepts a valid registered phone number and shows a success message instructing the user to check WhatsApp.

steps.description: Type "081234567890" into the phone number field

title: Request reset OTP with an unregistered phone number shows phone-not-found error
description: Verifies the forgot password form shows an error when the phone number is not found.

steps.description: Type "089999000011" into the phone number field

title: Submitting with empty phone number shows validation message
description: Verifies the form prevents submission when the phone number field is empty and displays a visible validation message.

title: Phone number with letters is rejected with a visible validation error
description: Verifies the phone number field rejects non-numeric input and shows a visible error message.

steps.description: Type "08ABCD123" into the phone number field

title: Phone number that is too short is rejected with a visible validation error
description: Verifies the form prevents submission for an obviously too-short phone number and shows a visible error.

steps.description: Type "0812" into the phone number field

title: Phone number with leading/trailing spaces still submits and shows success guidance
description: Verifies the phone number input tolerates whitespace and still produces a success guidance message after submission.

steps.description: Type " 081234567890 " into the phone number field

title: Forgot Password page has a visible path to Login
description: Verifies users can navigate from the Forgot Password page to the Login page using a visible link or button.

title: Reset password successfully with valid OTP and matching passwords
description: Verifies a user can reset their password using a valid OTP and matching new/confirm password fields and sees a success message with a path to login.

steps.description: Type "123456" into the OTP code field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Show error for expired or invalid OTP during reset
description: Verifies the reset password form shows an invalid/expired OTP error when an unusable OTP is submitted.

steps.description: Type "000000" into the OTP code field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Prevent submission when confirm password does not match new password
description: Verifies the UI blocks reset when new password and confirm password differ and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "123456" into the OTP code field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "DifferentPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Require OTP code before allowing reset submission
description: Verifies the form enforces OTP input and shows a visible error when OTP is missing.

steps.description: Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Require new password before allowing reset submission
description: Verifies the form enforces new password input and shows a visible error when new password is missing.

steps.description: Type "123456" into the OTP code field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Require confirm password before allowing reset submission
description: Verifies the form enforces confirm password input and shows a visible error when confirm password is missing.

steps.description: Type "123456" into the OTP code field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field

title: Navigate to Login from Reset Password page (post-reset call to action present)
description: Verifies the Reset Password experience provides a visible way to reach the Login page after a successful reset.

steps.description: Type "123456" into the OTP code field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Open Dashboard and verify overview widgets are visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the dashboard and see key overview sections (stat cards, quick actions, recent plans).

title: Quick Action: Business Background switches the active section and shows its list
description: Verifies clicking the Business Background quick action changes the dashboard section and displays the Business Background list content.

steps.description: Click the "Business Background" quick action card
Verify element "Business Background list" is visible

title: Sidebar navigation switches dashboard sections
description: Verifies the user can switch sections using the dashboard sidebar and the visible section content updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click on "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
Click on "Dashboard" in the sidebar menu

title: Stat cards are present and show summary labels
description: Verifies stat cards render on the dashboard and display module summary labels/values in a user-visible way.

title: Invalid login prevents access to Dashboard
description: Verifies that incorrect credentials do not allow entry to the protected dashboard and the user stays on the login page with an error.

steps.description: Verify one of the following texts is visible: "Invalid", "Incorrect", or "Login failed"

title: Create a new business background with required fields (without file upload)
description: Verifies a user can create a business background using required text fields and see it appear in the list.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
Type "Test Business Background A" into the business name field
Select a category option from the category dropdown
Type "This is a test description for business background A." into the description field
Verify text "Test Business Background A" is visible

title: Validation errors when saving with required fields empty
description: Verifies required-field validation appears when attempting to save an empty Business Background form.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
Verify at least one validation error message is visible on the form

title: Cancel add flow does not create a new entry
description: Verifies leaving the add form via a Cancel/Back action does not create a new business background.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
Type "Test Business Background Cancel" into the business name field
Click the Cancel or Back button on the form
Verify text "Test Business Background Cancel" is not visible

title: Edit an existing business background and verify updated values in list
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing entry and see updated text reflected after saving.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
If no entries are visible, click the "Tambah" (Add) button
If on the add form, type "Seed Business Background" into the business name field
If on the add form, select a category option from the category dropdown
If on the add form, type "Seed description" into the description field
If on the add form, click the Save button
Click the Edit button for the first visible business background entry
Type " (Updated)" at the end of the business name field

title: Delete an existing business background and verify it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete an entry and it no longer appears in the list after confirmation.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
If no entries are visible, click the "Tambah" (Add) button
If on the add form, type "Delete Me Business Background" into the business name field
If on the add form, select a category option from the category dropdown
If on the add form, type "This entry will be deleted." into the description field
If on the add form, click the Save button
Verify text "Delete Me Business Background" is visible
Click the Delete button for the "Delete Me Business Background" entry
Click the Confirm/Delete button in the confirmation dialog
Verify text "Delete Me Business Background" is not visible

title: View business background list loads and shows empty-state or entries
description: Verifies the list page renders correctly and shows either entries or an empty-state message.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
Verify the Business Background list section is visible

title: Prevent save when description is extremely long (field constraint handling)
description: Verifies the UI handles overly long description input by showing validation feedback or preventing successful save.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
Type "Test Business Background Long Desc" into the business name field
Select a category option from the category dropdown
Verify either a validation error message is visible or the form remains visible

title: Edit flow validation: clearing a required field blocks save
description: Verifies required-field validation triggers during edit when a required field is cleared and Save is clicked.

steps.description: Click "Business Background" in the sidebar menu
If no entries are visible, click the "Tambah" (Add) button
If on the add form, type "Seed For Edit Validation" into the business name field
If on the add form, select a category option from the category dropdown
If on the add form, type "Seed" into the description field
If on the add form, click the Save button
Click the Edit button for the "Seed For Edit Validation" entry (or the first visible entry)
Type "" into the business name field

title: Create a new Market Analysis with competitors and verify it appears in list and chart updates
description: Verifies a user can create a Market Analysis with TAM/SAM/SOM and competitor entries, then see it in the list and see the pie chart reflect the added data.

steps.description: Click "Tambah" to create a new market analysis
Type "UMKM kuliner di Jakarta" into the Target Market field
Click "Add Competitor" (or equivalent add competitor button)
Type "Kompetitor A" into the first competitor name field
Type "40" into the first competitor market share field
Click "Add Competitor" (or equivalent add competitor button)
Type "Kompetitor B" into the second competitor name field
Type "25" into the second competitor market share field
Verify text "UMKM kuliner di Jakarta" is visible

title: Validate inconsistent TAM/SAM/SOM using Calculate Market Size shows an error message
description: Verifies market size validation triggers when TAM/SAM/SOM values are inconsistent and the user attempts to calculate market size.

steps.description: Click "Tambah" to create a new market analysis
Type "Pasar fesyen online" into the Target Market field

title: Read existing Market Analysis list and verify charts are visible
description: Verifies a user can open Market Analysis module, view the list of saved analyses, and see chart components rendered.

steps.description: Verify element "market analyses list" is visible

title: Edit an existing Market Analysis and verify updates are reflected
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing Market Analysis, save changes, and see updated values displayed.

steps.description: Click "Edit" on the first market analysis in the list
Type " (Revisi)" into the Target Market field

title: Delete an existing Market Analysis and verify it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete a Market Analysis and it no longer appears in the list afterward.

steps.description: Click "Delete" on the first market analysis in the list
Click "Confirm" in the delete confirmation prompt

title: Required field validation: attempt to save without Target Market shows visible validation
description: Verifies the form prevents saving when required fields (Target Market) are missing and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click "Tambah" to create a new market analysis

title: Competitor entry validation: prevent saving when competitor share is non-numeric
description: Verifies competitor market share input enforces numeric validation and shows a visible error for non-numeric values.

steps.description: Click "Tambah" to create a new market analysis
Type "Pasar alat tulis" into the Target Market field
Click "Add Competitor" (or equivalent add competitor button)
Type "Kompetitor X" into the competitor name field
Type "abc" into the competitor market share field

title: SWOT fields can be filled and saved, then are visible when editing
description: Verifies SWOT inputs can be saved and persist by checking they are visible again when opening the edit view.

steps.description: Click "Tambah" to create a new market analysis
Type "Pasar laundry rumahan" into the Target Market field
Type "Kekuatan: lokasi strategis" into the Strengths field
Type "Kelemahan: modal terbatas" into the Weaknesses field
Type "Peluang: permintaan meningkat" into the Opportunities field
Type "Ancaman: pesaing baru" into the Threats field
Click "Edit" on the market analysis with target market "Pasar laundry rumahan"
Verify text "Kekuatan: lokasi strategis" is visible

title: Add a new Product with required fields (no image) and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can add a new product with name, description, and price, then see it listed.

steps.description: Type "Test Product A" into the name field
Type "A sample product description for UI testing." into the description field
Verify text "Test Product A" is visible

title: Add a new Service and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can add a new service and see it listed after saving.

steps.description: Type "Test Service B" into the name field
Type "A sample service description for UI testing." into the description field
Verify text "Test Service B" is visible

title: Validate required price field when creating a new item
description: Verifies the form prevents saving when price is empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "Test Product No Price" into the name field
Type "Attempt save without price." into the description field
Verify text "price is required" is visible

title: Cancel add new item and verify it does not create a new list entry
description: Verifies canceling out of the add form returns to the list without adding the new item.

steps.description: Type "Temp Item Should Not Save" into the name field
Verify text "Temp Item Should Not Save" is not visible

title: Validation: reject non-numeric price input
description: Verifies the price field enforces numeric input and shows a visible error when invalid text is entered.

steps.description: Type "Invalid Price Product" into the name field

title: Add a new non-recurring transaction and see it reflected in list and cash flow summary
description: Verifies a user can create a valid transaction and the UI updates the transaction list and cash flow summary.

title: Save a valid income transaction and confirm it appears in the transaction list
description: Verifies saving a valid income transaction adds a new row/item in the transaction list.

title: Create a transaction with recurring enabled and verify recurring setting is retained in the list/detail view
description: Verifies enabling the recurring toggle during creation persists and is visible after saving.

title: Validation: reject negative amount and prevent save
description: Verifies the form shows a validation message for a negative amount and does not create a transaction.

title: Validation: invalid or missing date blocks saving the transaction
description: Verifies the form requires a valid date and shows an error when date is invalid or not provided.

title: Filter by year updates the monthly comparison chart
description: Verifies changing the year filter updates the visible monthly comparison data on the page.

steps.description: Select a different year from the year filter dropdown

title: Cash flow summary is visible and shows both income and expense sections/labels
description: Verifies the cash flow summary section renders with expected headings/labels for key metrics.

steps.description: Verify element "Cash flow summary" is visible

title: Attempt to save with missing required fields shows validation and stays on the form
description: Verifies required fields (category, amount, date) enforce validation and the user is not returned to the list on failed save.

title: Generate a financial summary from simulation data and view it in the list
description: Verifies a logged-in user can generate a new financial summary from simulation data and see it appear in the summaries list.

steps.description: Click the "Generate summary from simulation data" button

title: Confirm generation and verify monthly comparison charts are shown
description: Verifies that confirming summary generation results in a visible new summary entry and monthly comparison charts.

steps.description: Click the "Generate summary from simulation data" button
Verify element "Monthly comparison charts" is visible

title: View summaries list loads and is visible
description: Verifies that the summaries list section renders for a logged-in user.

title: Filter summaries by year updates visible results
description: Verifies the user can change the year filter and the page reflects the selected year context.

steps.description: Select the most recent available year from the year dropdown

title: Filter summaries by month updates visible results
description: Verifies the user can change the month filter and the page reflects the selected month context.

steps.description: Select a month option from the month dropdown
Verify element "Monthly comparison charts" is visible

title: Cancel generation from confirmation dialog leaves list unchanged
description: Verifies that canceling the generation confirmation closes the dialog and does not proceed to generate a new summary.

steps.description: Click the "Generate summary from simulation data" button

title: Create multi-year forecast dataset and generate AI forecast results
description: Verifies a user can create a forecast dataset with multiple years of data and successfully generate AI forecast charts and insights.

title: Generate AI forecast shows warning/error when only single-year data exists
description: Verifies the system blocks or warns AI forecast generation when there is insufficient historical data (single year).

steps.description: Verify text "more historical data" is visible

title: Create forecast data requires mandatory fields (validation)
description: Verifies the Create forecast data form prevents saving when required fields are missing.

title: Forecast data list is visible after navigating to Forecast module
description: Verifies the Forecast module opens and shows the forecast data list view.

steps.description: Verify text "Create forecast data" is visible

title: Import forecast data from simulation creates or updates dataset for forecasting
description: Verifies a user can import data from simulation into the forecast module and sees confirmation or imported data visible.

title: AI forecast results page displays charts and insights after generation
description: Verifies that once forecast generation is triggered, the results view shows visible charts and insight text.

steps.description: Wait for the results content to appear

title: Forecast generation failure displays visible error message
description: Verifies that when forecast generation fails, the UI shows a visible error message instead of silently failing.

title: Edit affiliate slug and see updated affiliate link
description: Verifies an authenticated user can change the affiliate slug and the displayed affiliate link updates accordingly.

title: Cancel slug edit without saving keeps affiliate link unchanged
description: Verifies canceling out of slug editing does not change the currently displayed affiliate link.

steps.description: Verify the affiliate link element is visible

title: Slug validation: empty slug shows an error and does not update link
description: Verifies the slug cannot be saved as empty and the user sees a visible validation error.

title: Toggle affiliate link active/inactive updates visible status
description: Verifies the user can toggle the affiliate link state and a visible status indicator updates accordingly.

steps.description: Verify the affiliate link element is visible
Click the link active/inactive toggle control

title: View affiliate statistics and commission history sections
description: Verifies the affiliate page shows core statistics and a visible history section for commissions or referrals.

title: Request withdrawal with valid details shows success and appears in history
description: Verifies a user can submit a withdrawal request and see a success confirmation plus a new entry in withdrawal history.

steps.description: Type "100000" into the withdrawal amount field
Type "BCA" into the bank name field
Type "1234567890" into the account number field
Type "Test User" into the account holder name field

title: Request withdrawal with balance below minimum shows insufficient balance error
description: Verifies the user sees an error message when attempting to withdraw below the minimum/available balance constraint.

steps.description: Type "1" into the withdrawal amount field

title: Withdrawal form required fields: missing bank/account details shows validation error
description: Verifies the withdrawal request cannot be submitted with missing required payout details and shows visible validation messaging.

steps.description: Type "50000" into the withdrawal amount field

title: Cannot submit purchase until a package is selected
description: Verifies the purchase CTA is blocked (or a validation message appears) when the user tries to proceed without selecting a package.

steps.description: Verify text "Select package" or "Package is required" is visible

title: Cannot submit purchase until a payment method is selected
description: Verifies the purchase CTA is blocked (or a validation message appears) when the user tries to proceed without choosing VA or QRIS.

steps.description: Verify text "Select payment method" or "Payment method is required" is visible

title: View user profile details from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the profile panel and see their profile information fields.

title: Edit profile and save updated name and phone
description: Verifies a user can edit profile details and see the updated values after saving.

steps.description: Type "QA Updated Name" into the name field
Verify text "QA Updated Name" is visible

title: Upload a profile photo and save
description: Verifies the profile photo upload control is present and saving shows an updated profile avatar/photo area.

title: Phone format validation blocks save (not 628xxx)
description: Verifies an invalid phone format shows a validation error and prevents saving.

title: Cancel editing leaves profile details unchanged
description: Verifies cancelling out of edit mode does not apply changes to the profile view.

steps.description: Type "Name Not Saved" into the name field
Verify text "Name Not Saved" is not visible

title: Attempt to save with empty name shows validation error
description: Verifies the profile edit form validates required name and displays an error when empty.

title: Profile view shows role and username fields
description: Verifies the profile view includes role and username in addition to name and phone.

title: Change password entry point is available from profile
description: Verifies the user can access the change password option from the profile area.

title: Admin can access Admin Dashboard and view analytics cards and trend chart
description: Verifies an admin user can log in, open the Admin Dashboard section, and see key analytics UI elements.

steps.description: Click "Admin Dashboard" in the dashboard navigation
Verify a registration trend chart is visible

title: Admin can search users, open user details, and ban a user with confirmation
description: Verifies the user management workflow: search, open details modal, change status to banned, and confirm the change is acknowledged.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Type "test" into the user search field
Verify at least one user result row is visible

title: Admin can open a user detail modal from search results
description: Verifies that selecting a user from results opens a user detail modal with editable fields/actions visible.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Type "a" into the user search field
Click the first user result row

title: Admin can change a user's status to Banned and see a success confirmation
description: Verifies that banning a user from within the user detail modal produces visible confirmation feedback.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Type "a" into the user search field
Click the first user result row
Select "Banned" from the user status dropdown

title: Admin self-demotion is prevented when attempting to remove own admin role
description: Verifies the application blocks an admin from demoting their own role and shows a prevention error.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Type "admin" into the user search field
Click the user result row that shows username "admin"
Verify text "You cannot change your own role" is visible

title: Search with no matches shows an empty-state message
description: Verifies user search gracefully handles no results and shows a visible empty-state indicator.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Type "zzzz_no_such_user_12345" into the user search field
Verify text "No users found" is visible

title: User Management supports sorting by a column and reflects reordered results
description: Verifies clicking a sortable column header changes the visible ordering of user rows.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Verify at least two user result rows are visible
Click the "Created" column header to sort
Verify the first user row content has changed

title: Canceling out of user detail modal does not apply changes
description: Verifies closing the user detail modal without saving does not show an update confirmation.

steps.description: Click "User Management" in the dashboard navigation
Type "a" into the user search field
Click the first user result row
Select "Banned" from the user status dropdown
Verify text "Status updated" is not visible

title: Toggle to dark mode from dashboard header
description: Verifies a logged-in user can switch the UI from light to dark using the header toggle.

steps.description: Click the sun/moon icon in the header
Verify the header shows the opposite theme icon (sun if dark mode is active, moon if light mode is active)

title: Toggle to light mode after enabling dark mode
description: Verifies the user can toggle back to light mode after switching to dark mode.

steps.description: Click the sun/moon icon in the header
Click the sun/moon icon in the header
Verify the header shows the opposite theme icon (sun if dark mode is active, moon if light mode is active)

title: Theme stays consistent when navigating to another public page from dashboard
description: Verifies the theme remains applied when moving from the authenticated dashboard to a public page via in-app navigation links.

steps.description: Click the sun/moon icon in the header
Click the "FAQ" link in the site navigation
Verify the header shows the same theme icon state as on the dashboard (indicating the theme carried over)

title: Theme preference persists after logging out and logging back in (same browser)
description: Verifies that the chosen theme is still applied after ending and restarting an authenticated session in the same browser.

steps.description: Click the sun/moon icon in the header
Click the "Logout" button or "Sign out" option in the header/menu
Verify the header shows the same theme icon state as before logout (indicating the preference persisted)

title: Theme toggle is available and functional immediately on dashboard load
description: Verifies the dashboard header renders the theme toggle and it can be used without additional navigation.

steps.description: Verify element "sun/moon theme toggle icon" is visible
Click the sun/moon icon in the header
Verify the header shows the opposite theme icon (sun if dark mode is active, moon if light mode is active)

title: Landing page loads and shows hero section with CTAs
description: Verifies the public landing page loads and the hero section with primary call-to-action buttons is visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Register" CTA button is visible
Verify element "Login" CTA button is visible

title: Hero Register CTA redirects to Register page
description: Verifies clicking the Register CTA from the landing page navigates to the registration route.

steps.description: Click on the "Register" CTA button in the hero section

title: Hero Login CTA redirects to Login page
description: Verifies clicking the Login CTA from the landing page navigates to the login route.

steps.description: Click on the "Login" CTA button in the hero section

title: Landing page displays feature highlights section
description: Verifies the landing page includes the feature highlights section with visible content.

steps.description: Verify element "Feature highlights" section is visible

title: Landing page displays pricing preview section
description: Verifies the landing page includes a pricing preview with Free vs Pro information visible.

title: Landing page displays testimonials section
description: Verifies the landing page includes a testimonials section with visible testimonial content.

title: WhatsApp floating widget is visible on landing page
description: Verifies the WhatsApp floating widget is present and visible for users on the landing page.

steps.description: Verify element "WhatsApp floating widget" is visible
